title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Hexaware Technologies Global Group

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Hexaware Technologies Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Hexaware Technologies Global Group has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hexaware Technologies Global Group:
Hexaware Technologies Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
